title: podocarpus fasciculus
intro: Podocarpus fasciculus, also known as the Yellow Podocarp, is a species of coniferous tree native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Podocarpus fasciculus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves in water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
